description: The OnlineStatistics component shows information about current session numbers and the number of users in them.

fields.Timestamp: The last time the component got the online statistics successfully.
fields.ActiveVisibleSessions: Statistics of visible sessions with users active in them.
fields.ActiveHiddenSessions: Statistics of hidden sessions with users active in them.
fields.RegisteredOnlineUsers: How many users with a Resonite account are online
fields.TotalOnlineUsers: How many users are online in total
fields.PresentUsers: How many users are at their keyboard or in headset.
fields.AwayUsers: How many users have their status set to away?
fields.UsersInVR: How many users are in VR?
fields.UsersInScreen: How many users are in screen mode?
fields.UsersOnDesktop: How many users are on desktop?
fields.UsersOnMobile: How many users are using the mobile binary of the game?
fields.UsersInVisiblePublicSessions: How many users are in visible sessions?
fields.UsersInVisibleSemiAccessibleSessions: How many users are in semi accessible sessions like contacts or contacts plus?
fields.UsersInHiddenSessions: How many users are in hidden sessions
fields.UsersInPrivateSessions: How many users are in private sessions?
fields.UsersInPrivate: How many users are in private?
fields.UsersInLAN: How many users are in Local Access Network sessions?
fields.UsersInContacts: How many users are in contacts sessions?
fields.UsersInContactsPlus: How many users are in contacts plus sessions?
fields.UsersInRegistered: How many users are in sessions that require a logged in user? (Not nessarily resonite account because SAML)
fields.UsersInPublic: How many users are currently online in public sessions
fields.GraphicalClientUsers: How many users are not headlesses
fields.ChatClientUsers: How many users are using chat clients? (Like recon)
fields.HeadlessUsers: How many of the online users are Headless Accounts
fields.BotUsers: How many users are bot accounts (occasionally 1 when the resonite bot is online)

usage: Can be used to get session statistic data or make a hermit counter.
